_meta.description: Feature map — tracks which features exist, which files implement them, which agents built them, and how they're wired together. Agents read this to understand feature boundaries before refactoring, fixing, or upgrading.

_example_authentication.name: Authentication
_example_authentication.description: User login, signup, session management, route protection

wiring.data_flow: Login form → POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] → Prisma User lookup → JWT session → Cookie
wiring.signup_flow: Signup form → POST /api/auth/signup → Validate (Zod) → Hash password → Prisma create → Redirect to login
wiring.protection: middleware.ts checks cookie → redirect to /login if missing → return to original URL after login

_example_authentication.notes: Password hashing uses bcryptjs with 12 salt rounds. Sessions are JWT-based, stored in httpOnly cookies.
